name: Figma
description: Read Figma design files with optimized descriptive output for better code generation
description_zh: 读取 Figma 设计文件，以优化的描述性输出提升代码生成质量

mcp_config.name: figma
mcp_config.description: Figma - read design files, inspect layers, extract assets with descriptive output

auth.help_text: Create a Personal Access Token in Figma Account Settings
auth.help_text_zh: 在 Figma 账户设置中创建个人访问令牌

name: Unreal Engine
description: Control Unreal Engine editor via MCP — create actors, modify levels, manage blueprints and assets
description_zh: 通过 MCP 控制虚幻引擎编辑器 — 创建 Actor、修改关卡、管理蓝图和资产

mcp_config.name: unreal-engine
mcp_config.description: Unreal Engine - create/modify actors, levels, blueprints, materials via editor automation
mcp_config.post_connect_guide:
1. Open Unreal Engine 5.4+ project
2. Enable the "Unreal MCP" plugin (Edit > Plugins)
3. In Editor Preferences, enable "Auto Start MCP Server"
4. Verify http://127.0.0.1:8000/mcp is accessible
mcp_config.post_connect_guide_zh:
1. 打开 Unreal Engine 5.4+ 项目
2. 启用 "Unreal MCP" 插件（编辑 > 插件）
3. 在编辑器首选项中开启 "自动启动 MCP 服务器"
4. 确认 http://127.0.0.1:8000/mcp 可访问

name: Blender
description: Control Blender via MCP — create meshes, apply modifiers, render scenes, manage materials
description_zh: 通过 MCP 控制 Blender — 创建网格、应用修改器、渲染场景、管理材质

mcp_config.name: blender
mcp_config.description: Blender - create/edit meshes, modifiers, materials, render scenes via Python scripting
mcp_config.post_connect_guide:
1. Open Blender 4.0+
2. Install the "Blender MCP" addon (Edit > Preferences > Add-ons)
3. In the addon settings, click "Start MCP Server"
4. Verify http://127.0.0.1:9876/sse is accessible
mcp_config.post_connect_guide_zh:
1. 打开 Blender 4.0+
2. 安装 "Blender MCP" 插件（编辑 > 首选项 > 插件）
3. 在插件设置中点击 "启动 MCP 服务器"
4. 确认 http://127.0.0.1:9876/sse 可访问
